summary: Solid, well-organized test suite with comprehensive coverage of core requirements. Tests span unit tests (manifest parsing, license lookups, compliance evaluation, report formatting), workflow structure validation (triggers, file references, actionlint), and integration tests via act (3 test cases covering package.json, requirements.txt, and mixed scenarios). Clear test organization with logical Describe blocks and good separation of concerns. Covers main happy paths, basic error handling (file not found, malformed JSON), and key edge cases (semver prefix stripping, case-insensitive license matching, deny precedence over allow). Gaps include: no tests for malformed policy.json, missing policy files, empty manifests, or the Compliant status when only Unknown licenses are present; missing edge cases for various semver operators (>=, <=), pre-release versions, duplicate dependencies, and special characters in names. Would catch most regressions but lacks comprehensive error scenario coverage.
